uat_steps.description: Version stamp: App shell shows a subtle version/build indicator (footer or sidebar corner) that does not dominate primary UX
uat_steps.evidence: AppLayout.tsx L94-104: sidebar-footer div with fontSize 0.7rem, color #94a3b8, fontFamily monospace, content __BUILD_ID__.slice(0,7). Subtle, non-dominating, always visible.

uat_steps.description: Hover detail: Hover or focus reveals release tag, build id, and build timestamp — sufficient to distinguish pre/post deploy
uat_steps.evidence: AppLayout.tsx L101: title attribute with Release __RELEASE_TAG__, Build __BUILD_ID__, Timestamp new Date().toISOString(). Advisory: timestamp is client-side, not build-time. Release tag + build id sufficient for deploy verification.

probe_result.advisory: Tooltip timestamp uses client-side Date.now(), not build_timestamp from backend. Non-blocking — release tag + build id sufficient.

uat_steps.description: Backend metadata: GET /api/v1/meta/build-info returns authoritative build id and release tag matching Docker/build pipeline — no secrets
uat_steps.evidence: meta/mod.rs: option_env!() compile-time injection; lib.rs L210-214: public route before api_router; meta_test.rs 3/3 PASS (shape, no-secrets, fallback).

uat_steps.description: SPA embed: Frontend bundle embeds the same build id at compile time (Vite define from Docker build args)
uat_steps.evidence: vite.config.ts L8-11: define block with __BUILD_ID__ and __RELEASE_TAG__ via JSON.stringify(process.env.BUILD_ID || 'dev'); vite-env.d.ts L3-4: TS declarations; Dockerfile L29-36: frontend stage passes BUILD_ID=$BUILD_ID; npm run build PASS.

uat_steps.description: Stale detection: When SPA-embedded build id ≠ backend authoritative id, UI shows non-blocking stale warning with reload affordance
uat_steps.evidence: useStaleDetection.ts: on-mount useEffect fetches /api/v1/meta/build-info with cache:no-store; compares __BUILD_ID__ to server build_id; mismatch sets stale=true; skips dev mode; silent fail. StaleBanner.tsx: non-blocking banner with reload CTA. AppLayout.tsx L121: <StaleBanner stale={stale} />. Live stale detection deferred — BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY pending.

probe_result.note: Code-level PASS; live browser stale-detection probe deferred pending BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY

uat_steps.description: Regression: /health liveness unchanged; OIDC external profile smoke pass; metadata responses contain no env secrets
uat_steps.evidence: health/mod.rs: /health returns {status: 'ok'} unchanged; /health/ready unchanged; cargo lib 221/221; meta_test 3/3 (no-secrets test PASS); npm 31/31; build PASS. OIDC smoke deferred — BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY pending.

probe_result.test_results: cargo lib 221/221; meta_test 3/3; npm 31/31; build PASS
probe_result.note: OIDC external profile smoke deferred pending BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY

uat_steps.evidence: meta/mod.rs L19-21: Router::new().route('/api/v1/meta/build-info', get(build_info)); lib.rs L210-214: meta_router merged before api_router (public, no auth).

uat_steps.description: Build id = git short sha + release tag + UTC timestamp; Docker ARG chain propagates to all stages
uat_steps.evidence: meta/mod.rs L13-15: option_env!('BUILD_ID'), option_env!('RELEASE_TAG'), option_env!('BUILD_TIMESTAMP'); Dockerfile L3-5 global ARG, L10-12 builder ARG+ENV, L29-31 frontend ARG, L42-44 runtime ARG, L46-48 OCI LABELs.

probe_results.evidence_ref: frontend/vite.config.ts L8-11; npm run build PASS

probe_results.note: Live browser stale-detection probe deferred pending BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY
OIDC external profile smoke deferred pending BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY

Backend dev server (port 8080) unreachable; frontend dev server (port 5173) serves different app (Omniflow Trading). Cannot execute browser probes against finance_goblin target app. Target app requires BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY.
